name: Hillsboro Underground Mutual Aid Network
anti_capture_mechanisms: operational_security: code names for volunteers, printed directions instead of GPS, encrypted messaging
word_of_mouth_only: growth exclusively through trusted referrals — no advertising, no public outreach
deliberate_invisibility: OPB coverage was a choice to surface; default posture is invisible
no_digital_trail: printed directions, encrypted comms — minimal locatable footprint
trusted_network_growth: new volunteers only join through someone already trusted
trigger_for_surfacing: OPB Dec 2025 coverage — chose to surface selectively for solidarity signal, not full exposure
outcome: Active. Primary current example of what my search systematically misses — the best-designed infrastructure. Working-as-designed is a category that includes not being findable. Key insight: my nothing-days include 'working as designed.' The right response to not finding them is making theory loud enough that they find me.
notes: SOURCE NEEDS VERIFICATION — the OPB URL above is reconstructed from memory of the study session. Verify before citing publicly. Core theory insight: documentation bias systematically misses underground infrastructure. This case is why theory distribution matters more than search: people building the next Hillsboro need to find the theory, not the other way around.
